zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy於1320年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，他的父親Henry Percy21歲，母親Idonea de Clifford20歲。他於從1334年9月9日到1334年10月8日與Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster在英國斯塔福爾圖特波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1368年5月18日在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy于1320年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克时，他的父亲Henry Percy21岁，母亲Idonea de Clifford20岁。他于从1334年9月9日到1334年10月8日与Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster在英国斯塔福爾圖特波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1368年5月18日在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy was born in 1320, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, his father, Henry Percy, was 21 and his mother, Idonea de Clifford, was 20. He married Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster from 9 September 1334 to 8 October 1334, in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 18 May 1368, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy est né en 1320, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Henry Percy, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Idonea de Clifford, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster du 9 septembre 1334 au 8 octobre 1334, à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1368, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy 1320 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Percy 21 und seine Mutter Idonea de Clifford 20. Er hat von 9. September 1334 bis 8. Oktober 1334 in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 18. Mai 1368 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England und wurde in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy è nato il nel 1320 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Henry Percy, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Idonea de Clifford, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster da 9 settembre 1334 a 8 ottobre 1334, nel Tutbury, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 18 maggio 1368, nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Alnwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percyが1320年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父Henry Percyは21歳，母Idonea de Cliffordは20歳であった。から1334年9月9日まで1334年10月8日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーでMary Plantagenet Mary of Lancasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1368年5月18日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy(이)가 1320년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Percy(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Idonea de Clifford(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1334년 9월 9일부터 1334년 10월 8일까지 영국 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에서 Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1368년 5월 18일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅에 묻혔다.

pt.September 1334: de 9 de setembro de 1334 a 8 de outubro de 1334
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy nasceu em 1320, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Percy, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Idonea de Clifford, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster de 9 de setembro de 1334 a 8 de outubro de 1334, em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1368, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy родился в 1320 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Percy было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Idonea de Clifford, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster с 9 сентября 1334 по 8 октября 1334 в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 18 мая 1368 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy nació en 1320, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Percy, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Idonea de Clifford, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster desde 9 de septiembre de 1334 hasta 8 de octubre de 1334, en Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1368, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
